# virtualbox_network (Resource)

Manages a VirtualBox Host-Only network.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the host-only network.

### Optional

- `dhcp` (Boolean) Enable DHCP on the network.
- `dhcp_lower_ip` (String) Lower bound of the DHCP IP range.
- `dhcp_upper_ip` (String) Upper bound of the DHCP IP range.
- `network_cidr` (String) The network CIDR (e.g., '192.168.56.0/24').

### Read-Only

- `guid` (String) The GUID of the network.
